tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results show mild hypoglycemia, low HDL cholesterol, slightly elevated LDL cholesterol, high chloride, and low total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Renal function and microalbumin are normal. Glycemic control (HbA1c) is within target. Recommend clinical correlation for possible causes of hypoglycemia and metabolic acidosis, and consider cardiovascular risk management due to lipid profile.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
